race.comment: VERSAILLE (4) is a former Moody galloper who had three good runs for this yard in her last campaign including a fresh-up win. Best form is while fresh and looks a top chance to kick off on the right note again. DEVILS I (2) doesn't win out of turn but ran a strong race last time when a narrow second over 1000m here. Should camp just off the leaders. Nice return and capable of fighting out the finish again. KUNAPIPI (6) pushed forward from a wide draw last time out and was prominent for a long way before fading to finish fourth over 1400m at this track. Overdue for a win and gets her chance. SHE IS ALL MAGIC (5) finished tenth over 1115m at Kyneton at her most recent appearance on November 18. Lines up today for the first time for trainer Jackie Scott. Tricky gate but best form is while fresh. FUZZYBOX (11) rates highly on best form and can sneak into the finish.
